texto: It is almost a cliche to speak of the professed atheist who cries out for help to God when he is in mortal danger. The profession of atheism is done by the conscious mind, but the subconscious still believes in God.
explicacao: Citação de Serge Kahili King sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is almost a cliche to speak of the professed atheist who cries out for help to God when he is …” articula reflexao, atheism, huna em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como huna.
